exact.entry_equivalence: Q_(9,n)>0 iff M_n>0 inside the completed order-eight cone

proof_boundary: This artifact proves Q_(9,n)(-100)>0 only for 0<=n<=1240. It does not prove the n>=1241 tail, all-shift order-nine entry, forward invariance, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: Signed order nine is a positive lower-cone scale times one relative Q8 log-concavity margin.
Every Q8 value is evaluated through cancellation-preserving H4, H5, Q6, Q7, and Q8 coordinates.
Merged outward-rounded Arb sources enclose every endpoint coefficient through A_1256.
Two retained-integral repairs preserve all sixth-nested interval seams.
rows.proof_boundary: Two contiguous finite high-precision repairs only.

rows.claim: All stable lower coordinates and every required Q8 value are strictly positive.
Every available relative Q8 log-concavity margin is strictly positive.
Positive lower-cone factors and relative margins prove the complete cached signed order-nine prefix.
Prove the signed order-nine endpoint margin on the infinite tail beginning at n=1241.
rows.proof_boundary: Open analytic tail; not an all-shift order-nine theorem.

status: rigorous lambda=-100 signed order-nine prefix through n=1240 with one open analytic tail
